---
title: "Search"
---

<div id="search"></div>

<script>
  window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {
    const { PagefindUI } = await import('/pagefind/pagefind-ui.js');
    new PagefindUI({ 
      element: '#search',
      showImages: false,
      openFilters: ['Categories']
    });
  });
</script>

## Searching comments

Looking for something in the comments? Post comments are stored as GitHub Discussions and can be searched directly on GitHub at [github.com/YOUR-ORG/YOUR-REPO/discussions](https://github.com/YOUR-ORG/YOUR-REPO/discussions).
